prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 4SN-BLE-STEMLESSWINEGLASSES-4PC Product Type: DRINKING_CUP Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille 4pc Stemless Wine Glasses Kitchen Decor Entertaining Essentials, 21oz (Made in USA) Description: Sip in style with Beille’s Set of Four Stemless Wine Glasses, made right here in the USA.

Featuring a generous 21oz volume, these stemless wine glasses are ideal for reds, whites, and everything in between, making them perfect for both casual sips or sophisticated and more formal gatherings. Whether you're enjoying a quiet evening at home or hosting a large dinner party, our wine glasses are crafted with quality in mind for an enjoyable drinking experience with each and every use.

The durable glass ensures a crystal clear view of your favorite wine, while the stemless structure provides stability and comfort when holding and sipping. Stemless wine glasses have a reputation of being too delicate, however, that’s not the case here! A not to thin top, complemented by sturdy base, provides weight, comfort and a noticeable balance when in hand.

Elevate your wine experience with this set of four premium stemless wine glasses from Beille. The classic design makes them great to pair with other glassware and will quickly become a staple in any kitchen.

Dishwasher Safe.

Sold as a set of four. Search Terms: Wine glasses; kitchen décor; entertaining essentials; stemless wine glass; wedding registry gifts; farmhouse décor; girls night; housewarming gifts new home; kitchen essentials for new home; red wine glasses; white wine glasses; wine glasses stemless Features: - STEMLESS WINE GLASSES: Featuring a generous 21oz volume, dishwasher safe, highly versatile and made in the USA, these stemless wine glasses from Beille can do it all, and will quickly become a staple in any kitchen - VERSATILE USE: Ideal for reds, whites, and everything in between, these wine glasses are perfect for everyday use and yet, can seamlessly transition for more sophisticated gatherings or formal settings; also suitable for juice, water, cocktails and more - STYLISH AND CLASSIC DESIGN: Stemless structure provides durability and stability; a not to thin top is complemented by a sturdy base that provides and weight and comfort when holding and sipping - DISHWASHER SAFE: Top rack dish washer safe for quick and easy clean up - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 5 x 3.5 inches; Set Weight: 2.06lbs === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.title_differentiation: Set Of 4, Dishwasher Safe, Made In USA, Durable Glass, Classic Design, Versatile For Wine And Cocktails

openai.title_differentiation: Set Of 4, 21Oz Capacity, Dishwasher Safe, Made In USA, Sturdy Base, Versatile For Wine, Cocktails And Juice
